task_completion.description: Verify the product name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Handcrafted Leather Wallet' is visible in the main product title input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the product type is set to Simple product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Data' dropdown shows 'Simple product' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the regular price is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '45.99' is visible in the 'Regular price' input field under the General tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the SKU is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 'HLW-BRN-01' is visible in the 'SKU' input field under the Inventory tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is assigned to the Accessories category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox next to 'Accessories' in the 'Product categories' sidebar panel is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the product has been published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product published.' success message is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Publish' button in the Publish panel has changed to 'Update'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WooCommerce web interface in Firefox.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard in the Firefox browser, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing 'wp wc product create' or similar wp-cli commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of typing or pasting values into the specific WooCommerce product fields, rather than a sudden appearance of the final published page without intermediate steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Product Name: 'Handcrafted Leather Wallet'. Expected SKU: 'HLW-BRN-01'. Expected Regular Price: '45.99'. Expected Category: 'Accessories'. Expected Product Type: 'Simple product'. Expected Final Status: Published.
